---
title: "‘In Memoriam M.A.D.’"
---

## ‘In Memoriam M.A.D.’

**Author:** John Duke Coleridge
**Date:** (December 1878)
**Imprint:** <i>Monthly Packet, </i>3rd series 2  521, 523.

### Notes

See also [[person:343]John Duke Coleridge], 1st Lord Coleridge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
